---
title: "Learn Julia"
---

## 查看变量类型

```{.julia}
x = 10

print(x)
```

## 多项式支持

``` julia
2x^2 - 3x + 1
```

## 向量化操作

``` julia
[1, 2, 3] .^ 3
```

## 类型转换

``` julia
x = 1.5
round(x)
```

``` julia
Int(round(x))
```

## 函数

``` julia
∑(x, y) = x + y
println(
    ∑(1, 2)
)
```

``` julia
# 函数可以包含类型
function ∑(x::Integer, y::Integer)::Integer
    x + y
end
∑(1, 2)
```

## 没有返回值 return noting

``` julia
function printx(x)
    println("x = $x")
    return nothing
end
```

## 匿名函数

``` julia
map(
    x -> x^2 + 1,
    [1, 2, 3]
)
```
